name: Ditto
obtainMethod: Your starter partner. Ditto is with you from the beginning of the game.

name: Shellos East Sea
obtainMethod: Build a Road Sign habitat in any area (Arrow Sign x1, Wooden Path x3). Rare spawn — both West Sea and East Sea forms can appear randomly.

name: Gastrodon East Sea
obtainMethod: Build an Ocean Fishing Spot habitat in any area (Fishing Rod x1, Ocean Water x1, Seat x1). Rare spawn — both West Sea and East Sea forms can appear randomly.

name: Farfetch'd
obtainMethod: Build an All Packed Up habitat in any area (Cardboard Boxes x2, Cart x1). Common spawn.

name: Paldean Wooper
obtainMethod: Build a Marshy Tall Grass habitat in any area (Yellow Tall Grass x4, Muddy Water x2). Muddy Water can be found at Bleak Beach.

name: Pelipper
obtainMethod: Build an Elevated Yellow Tall Grass (Yellow Tall Grass x4) or Windy Flower Bed (Seashore Flowers x4, Windmill Kit x1) habitat in any area. Rare spawn.

name: Tatsugiri Curly Form
obtainMethod: Build a Beach Set habitat in any area. All three Tatsugiri forms (Curly, Droopy, Stretchy) can appear randomly.

name: Tatsugiri Droopy Form
obtainMethod: Build a Beach Set habitat in any area. All three Tatsugiri forms (Curly, Droopy, Stretchy) can appear randomly.

name: Tatsugiri Stretchy Form
obtainMethod: Build a Beach Set habitat in any area. All three Tatsugiri forms (Curly, Droopy, Stretchy) can appear randomly.

name: Stereo Rotom
obtainMethod: Found in Rocky Ridges during the main story. Follow Scorbunny through a tunnel and break a glowing stone wall with upgraded Rock Smash to find Stereo Rotom inside.

name: Toxtricity Amped Form
obtainMethod: Build an Amped Rock Stage habitat (Speakers x2, Cool Electric Guitar x1, Small Stage x1, Standing Mic x1). Craft the Cool Electric Guitar using Strange Strings found in Rocky Ridges treasure blocks. The Small Stage requires Level 5 Environment Level in Rocky Ridges.

name: Toxtricity Low Key Form
obtainMethod: Build a Low-Key Rock Stage habitat (Speakers x2, Cool Bass Guitar x1, Small Stage x1, Standing Mic x1). Craft the Cool Bass Guitar using Strange Strings found in Rocky Ridges treasure blocks. The Small Stage requires Level 5 Environment Level in Rocky Ridges.

name: Armarouge
obtainMethod: Find an Armor Fragment in treasure blocks, then craft Auspicious Armor (Armor Fragment x1, Iron Ingot x1). Build an Auspicious Knight's Shrine habitat (Pedestal, Auspicious Armor, Stepping Stones x2, lit Firepits x2). Requires a Burn specialty Pokémon.

name: Mime Jr.
obtainMethod: Build a Spotless Washing Station habitat (Wall Mirror x1, Sink x1, Towel Rack x1) or Public Reading Material habitat (Newspaper x1, Magazine Rack x1). Common spawn.

name: Mr. Mime
obtainMethod: Build a Spotless Washing Station habitat (Wall Mirror x1, Sink x1, Towel Rack x1). Common spawn.

name: Porygon2
obtainMethod: Build a Work Desk habitat (Office Desk x1, Office Chair x1, Mug x1, Laptop x1). Rare spawn.

name: Porygon-Z
obtainMethod: Build a Game Corner Battle Zone habitat (Arcade Machine x2, Seat x2). Arcade Machines are obtained by appraising Large Lost Relics from Professor Tangrowth. Rare spawn.

name: Noivern
obtainMethod: Build a Rhythmic Living Room habitat (Television x2, Speaker x2, Music Mat x4). Music Mat recipes are available from the Daily Shop.

name: Kyogre
obtainMethod: Encountered during the 'Yawn up a Storm!' main quest in Withered Wastelands. After rebuilding the fishing docks and freeing a trapped Onix, Kyogre appears. May reappear randomly in the ocean afterward, bringing rain. Cannot become a resident.

name: Raikou
obtainMethod: Found on Ocean Dream Island (use Pikachu Doll). Check Pokédex filters to confirm presence. Break steel blocks in central caves to reach.

name: Entei
obtainMethod: Found on Volcanic Dream Island (use Arcanine Doll). Check Pokédex filters to confirm presence. Break Lava Blocks in central mountain caves to reach.

name: Suicune
obtainMethod: Found on Wasteland Dream Island (use Eevee Doll). Check Pokédex filters to confirm presence. Break Ice blocks in central rocky caves to reach.

name: Volcanion
obtainMethod: Appears at the volcano summit in Rocky Ridges after completing the 'Time to Party' quest. Collect 15 Rainbow Feathers and offer them at the summit shrine to summon Volcanion.

name: Articuno
obtainMethod: Build the Freezing Chambers in Palette Town. Get the kit from the eastern island (Yellow Poké Ball on a plinth). Materials: Stone x50, Ice x50, Crystal Fragments x10, Pokémetal x10. Requires Build and Water specialty Pokémon.

name: Zapdos
obtainMethod: Build the Abandoned Power Plant in Palette Town. Get the kit from the southern island mountain top (Yellow Poké Ball on a plinth). Materials: Copper Ingots x50, Iron Ingots x50, Sealass Fragments x50, Bricks x50, Pokémetal x10. Requires Build, Crush, Fly, and Generate specialty Pokémon.

name: Moltres
obtainMethod: Build the Altar of Flame in Palette Town. Get the kit from the northwestern island (Yellow Poké Ball on a plinth). Materials: Copper Ingots x50, Gold Ingots x50, Lava Rocks x50, Pokémetal x10. Requires Build specialty Pokémon.

name: Lugia
obtainMethod: Befriend Articuno, Zapdos, and Moltres first. This unlocks Tidal Bell recipe. Craft it with 5 Silver Feathers (dropped by Lugia flying overhead - use Cut to pick up) and 5 Rare Pokémetal. Ring the bell when Lugia flies overhead. Cannot be housed in a habitat.

name: Ho-Oh
obtainMethod: Befriend Raikou, Entei, and Suicune first. This unlocks Clear Bell recipe. Craft it with 5 Rainbow Feathers (dropped by Ho-Oh flying overhead - use Water Gun to pick up) and 5 Rare Pokémetal. Ring the bell when Ho-Oh flies overhead. Cannot be housed in a habitat.

name: Mewtwo
obtainMethod: Found in Sparkling Skylands. Complete Tinkatuff's storyline and restore the Skyland Building (one floor per day). First encounter adds to Pokédex. To befriend: find on a Dragonite Dream Island behind breakable walls.

name: Mew
obtainMethod: Collect 27 Mysterious Slates (shiny ground spots, use Search specialty + Dowsing Machine). Find the Unown Mural in Withered Wastelands (break rocky wall right of path near Horsea Fountain, then left through another wall). Match slate symbols to mural slots. Mew appears from portal.
